codeReview.summary: F003 implementation successfully sets up a local SQLite mirror structure in Electron with per-module per-periode database files, connection pooling, and D1 schema mirroring. The LocalDatabaseManager class provides a clean singleton-based API, integrates with main.ts lifecycle, and exposes useful IPC handlers. Minor schema parity inconsistency exists in master table sync_status defaults.

issues.description: COA table local sync_status defaults to 'synced', but D1 migration (0001_initial_schema.sql) defaults to 'pending'. Same discrepancy for aspek_kerja (line 207) and blok (line 230). Consider aligning defaults for schema parity.

Connection 'pooling' with sql.js loads the entire DB into memory on get and must be explicitly saved/exported. This is a limitation of sql.js rather than a bug, but pool eviction without an active write-through strategy means un-persisted changes could be lost if a DB is evicted before saveDatabase is called. The implementation mitigates this by calling saveDatabase before eviction and on closeAll.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md mentions 'SQLite library is selected (better-sqlite3 or node-sqlite3)' as a precondition, but the codebase actually uses sql.js. The worker correctly used the already-installed sql.js library.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: package.json contains sql.js dependency; src/main/localDatabaseManager.ts imports from 'sql.js'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill work procedure focuses on modifying blokDatabase.ts and coaDatabase.ts. For F003, the worker created a new localDatabaseManager.ts instead, which was the right architectural choice but not explicitly covered by the skill.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: skill.md 'Investigation Phase' only mentions blokDatabase.ts and coaDatabase.ts; handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true with no deviations noted.

summary: Feature F003 passes review. The local SQLite mirror structure is well-implemented with separate database files per module per periode, proper app data directory storage, and functional connection pooling. One minor non-blocking issue: master table sync_status defaults differ between local and D1 schemas. No blocking bugs found.
